title: Executive Order No. 1, s. 1966
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 1

CONFERRING CABINET RANK UPON THE RESIDENTIAL ASSISTANT ON COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT

By virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby elevate the Presidential Assistant on Community Development to the rank of a Member of the Cabinet, with all the rights, honors and privileges pertaining to that position.

Done in the City of Manila, this 1st day of January, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-six.

(Sgd.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President:

(Sgd.) RAFAEL M. SALAS Executive Secretary

Source : Malacañang Records Office

Office of the President of the Philippines. (1966). [Executive Order Nos. : 1 – 140]. Manila : Malacañang Records Office.
